name: Upstream Bio, Inc.
business: Upstream Bio is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing treatments for inflammatory diseases, with an initial focus on severe respiratory disorders. Its lead product candidate, verekitug, is a TSLP receptor antagonist currently in Phase 2 trials for severe asthma, chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps (CRSwNP), and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). The company has reported positive top-line results in its CRSwNP and severe asthma Phase 2 trials and plans to initiate Phase 3 trials in early 2027.
sellsTo: patients with chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps
patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing treatments for inflammatory diseases, with an initial focus on severe respiratory disorders.

catalysts.sentence: We initiated our Phase 2 COPD trial in July 2025.

catalysts.event: Reported positive top-line results in CRSwNP Phase 2 trial
catalysts.sentence: We reported positive top-line results in our CRSwNP Phase 2 trial in September 2025

catalysts.event: Reported positive top-line results in severe asthma Phase 2 trial
catalysts.sentence: We reported positive top-line results in our severe asthma Phase 2 trial in February 2026.

catalysts.event: Plan to initiate Phase 3 trials in severe asthma and CRSwNP
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate dosing in Phase 3 trials in both severe asthma and CRSwNP in the first quarter of 2027.
